creator: roma.a.g@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Oleg Deordiev from comment #4)
> I tried run make command:
> root@build93x32:/usr/ports/www/rejik # make
> "Makefile", line 21: Missing dependency operator
> "Makefile", line 23: Missing dependency operator
> "Makefile", line 24: Missing dependency operator
There was spaces instead of tabs, in .shar file. Fixed.
Oleg, next time provide more information, about environment, please.
